title: LeverageConfiguration
description: Leverage configuration for a specific settlement type and trade direction combination.

settlementType.description: The settlement type this configuration applies to. Possible values: CFD, REAL, REAL_FUTURES, MARGIN_TRADE.

direction.description: The trade direction. Possible values: LONG, SHORT.

leverageValues.description: Available leverage multipliers for this settlement type and direction.

isPotential.description: Additional user questionnaire may be required to allow the user to trade with this setup of settlement and leverages.

minPositionAmount.description: Minimum monetary collateral required to open a position under this leverage configuration.

allowEditStopLoss.description: Whether the stop-loss can be edited for positions under this configuration.

minStopLossPercentage.description: Minimum stop-loss percentage allowed from the allocated margin of the position.

maxStopLossPercentage.description: Maximum stop-loss percentage allowed from the allocated margin of the position.

defaultStopLossPercentage.description: Default stop-loss percentage applied when no explicit value is provided.

allowEditTakeProfit.description: Whether the take-profit can be edited.

minTakeProfitPercentage.description: Minimum take-profit percentage allowed from the allocated margin of the position.

maxTakeProfitPercentage.description: Maximum take-profit percentage allowed from the allocated margin of the position.

defaultTakeProfitPercentage.description: Default take-profit percentage applied when no explicit value is provided.

allowStopLossTakeProfit.description: Whether stop-loss and take-profit can be set on a position.
